articles.title: How Fake News Became the Most Dangerous Force in Energy Markets
articles.description: AI-generated misinformation is already moving energy markets. Hydaway Digital is building the verification layer financial systems desperately need.
articles.content:
We live in a dangerously synthetic world. Scalper-style traders reportedly generated significant profits on suspiciously timed oil trades surrounding Iran war developments in Q2.

articles.title: Canada Introduces Bill To Ban Social Media For Children Under 16 And Regulate AI Chatbots
articles.description: Canada has introduced a new digital safety bill that would ban social media for children under 16 and regulate AI chatbots, with significant penalties for companies that fail to meet new safety standards.

articles.title: Canada's 'AI for All' strategy has ambitious growth targets, but it falls short on workers and the environment
articles.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney unveiled Canada's AI for All strategy on June 4, committing more than $2 billion in new spending and targeting $200 billion in additional GDP growth and 250,000 new jobs by 2031.
articles.content:

articles.title: Commentary: The Hidden Forces Driving China’s Inflation Surge
articles.description: Commentary: The Hidden Forces Driving China’s Inflation Surge - May’s unexpected 3.9% spike in producer prices isn't a sign of broad macroeconomic overheating. Instead, a brutal supply clearing and the global artificial intelligence boom are quietly reshaping the cost of tomorrow
articles.content: China’s May inflation data, released on June 10, offers a surprising narrative. While the Consumer Price Index (CPI) held steady at 1.2% year-over-year, the Producer Price Index (PPI) surged to 3.9%, beating market expectations of 3.5%. This persiste... [257 chars]

articles.title: Die another day: one year on, AI 171 crash conspiracy theories remain
articles.description: Conspiracy theories persist, fueled by an interim report suggesting pilot error and ongoing concerns about the Boeing 787 Dreamliner's computer systems and potential for unintended flight system commands.
articles.content: Friday, June 12, marks one year since the shortest flight in Indian history, and one the country will never forget, but for the wrong reason. Air India’s AI 171 took off from Ahmedabad for London, but came down in 32 seconds over a medical college ho... [4267 chars]
